null_baseline_summary.method_note: Within each symbol, accepted validation signal timestamps were grouped into deterministic weekly blocks, blocks were shuffled, and original side labels were replayed at shuffled timestamps with the same 1% stop and 2% take-profit rules.

signal_logic.exit_policy: 1% stop, 2% take profit, conservative stop-first if both hit same bar
signal_logic.fake_cross_gate: reject if active level updated within minStableBars or changed current/previous bar
signal_logic.long_true_cross: support stable, ema9[1] < support, ema9 >= support
signal_logic.raw_cross_definition: EMA9 crossing the active confirmed support/resistance step level
signal_logic.short_true_cross: resistance stable, ema9[1] > resistance, ema9 <= resistance
